testcase.name: test_apply_existing_job
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter9_endpoints.py:192: in test_apply_existing_job assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"job create: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: job create: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","raw_text"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"title":"Senior Python Engineer (TEST_iter9)","company":"ORA Test Corp","location":"Remote","description":"Build distributed Python systems with FastAPI and MongoDB. 5+ years required.","source":"manual","source_url":"https://example.com/jobs/iter9"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
